title: RSS Feeds — Immigration, Refugees and Citizenship Canada - Canada.ca
content:
## RSS Feeds — Immigration, Refugees and Citizenship Canada
Subscribe to our RSS feeds for ongoing news and alerts delivered directly to your RSS reader . What is RSS?
To sign up select the RSS button for the feed you wish to add to your list. Or, copy the link for the feed you wish to add to your list, then paste it into your RSS feed reader.
- Newsroom - https://api.io.canada.ca/io-server/gc/news/en/v2?dept=departmentofcitizenshipandimmigration&sort=publishedDate&orderBy=desc&publishedDate%3E=2021-07-23&pick=50&format=atom&atomtitle=Immigration,%20Refugees%20and%20Citizenship%20Canada
